title: Disability Law Center Self-Advocacy Guide (October 2023)
description: Self-advocacy guide published by the Disability Law Center (DLC), Massachusetts's federally designated Protection & Advocacy organization, dated October 2023. Provides free-legal-advocacy-oriented guidance for Massachusetts residents with disabilities on asserting rights and navigating accommodation and benefits processes. Serves as a complementary reference to the mass.gov RA-process materials in this folder.
notes: Binary PDF (~257 KB); not text-extracted, so contents are summarized from title/publisher rather than parsed. The DLC is the federally designated Protection & Advocacy (P&A) organization for Massachusetts.
